title: PCTL / probabilistic tier
manager: A probabilistic verification tier — PCTL properties like "the probability of failure is at most 0.001" and expected-cost queries — via the Storm backend. This is what lets FSL verify the stochastic machines it can already model: a machine with weighted transitions or random draws gets probabilistic guarantees, not just yes/no safety, which is what reliability and performance modeling actually need.
cs: PCTL via Storm (`P>=x [...]`, expected-cost); the probabilistic verification tier; verifies stochastic machines (weighted edges W7.34, rand W6.52); budgets/undecided apply.
